title: Caddy handle_path Directive and URL Token Injection
wikilinks: Caddy handle_path Directive and Its Impact on Upstream URL Construction

summary: The Caddy web server's `handle_path` directive strips matched path prefixes before proxying requests to upstream services. This behavior can cause issues when backend applications build absolute URLs expecting the prefix to be present, s...
